failedAssertions.reason: Re-run stock validation still found failing pre-2021 stocks without 5-year coverage; the latest flow report counted 2376 pre-2021 listings missing early stock daily data or starting after 2021-06-01.

Latest stock validation still found 1168 post-2021 IPO listings whose stock daily data starts more than 30 days after list_date or is entirely missing.
Expanded stock universe is still not fully backfilled; 294 watchlist symbols lack any stock daily row before 2021-06-01, including pre-2021 stock 000792.

No data consistency section exists and GET /api/health/consistency returns 404.

No status-transition browser notification implementation exists.
